asset.title: L2 Edit
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, well-paced step-by-step visualization of an AI agent performing a Compare-And-Set (CAS) edit on a spreadsheet cell, demonstrating locking, versioning, and committing.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly demonstrates the CAS flow, showing cell selection, locking, writing, and version incrementing.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the complete sequence from initial state to lock, write, commit, and release.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed UI with clear row highlighting and step progress indicators.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the spreadsheet and agent execution trace paradigm.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity step-by-step trace representation of agent actions.

legibility.evidence: High contrast text and clear layout make it highly readable.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Relevant for demonstrating safe multi-agent database/spreadsheet writes.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the logical steps of a CAS transaction.

defects.observed: The 'say' step at step 2/7 and 6/7 has no accompanying text or dialogue bubble.
defects.fix: Add placeholder text or remove the empty 'say' steps to streamline the sequence.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch an AI agent safely update a spreadsheet cell using Compare-And-Set (CAS) protocol to prevent write collisions.
